nodes.name: Pulitzer's longbill
nodes.summary: Pulitzer's longbill（Macrosphenus pulitzeri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Pulitzer's longbill。

nodes.name: Macrosphenus
nodes.summary: Macrosphenus（Macrosphenus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Kemp's longbill、Yellow longbill、Grey longbill等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pulitzer's longbill
nodes.summary: Pulitzer's longbill (Macrosphenus pulitzeri) is a species of bird. Formerly considered an "Old World warbler" and placed in the family Sylviidae, it is now considered to belong to a group of enigmatic African warblers in the family Macrosphenidae. It is found only in Angola. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
